sentences.arabic: يَحْتَفِلُ الْعَرَبُ بِشَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ بِطُرُقٍ خَاصَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapi proslavljaju mjesec ramazan na posebne načine.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs celebrate the month of Ramadan in special ways.

sentences.arabic: تَجْتَمِعُ الْعَائِلَاتُ عَلَى مَائِدَةِ الإِفْطَارِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ عِنْدَ الْغُرُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Porodice se svakodnevno okupljaju za iftar stolom pri zalasku sunca.
sentences.translationEn: Families gather at the iftar table every day at sunset.

sentences.translation: Ulice su ispunjene ukrasima i šarenim svjetlima.
sentences.translationEn: The streets fill with decorations and colourful lights.

sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ النَّاسُ الْقُرْآنَ وَيَتَصَدَّقُونَ عَلَى الْفُقَرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi čitaju Kuran i daju sadaku siromašnima.
sentences.translationEn: People read the Quran and give charity to the poor.

sentences.arabic: شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ وَقْتٌ لِلتَّقَرُّبِ مِنَ اللَّهِ وَمِنَ الأَهْلِ.
sentences.translation: Ramazan je vrijeme za zbližavanje s Bogom i porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: Ramadan is a time for drawing closer to God and to family.
